ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property unit */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "living_area_sqft" REAL /* Living area of the property in square feet */,
  "living_area_m2" REAL /* Living area of the property in square meters */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property unit involved in the transaction */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the property was closed (sold) */,
  "sold_price" REAL /* Final sold price of the property */,
  "list_price" REAL /* Original list price of the property */,
  "days_on_market" TEXT /* Number of days the property was on the market before being sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who managed the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned on the transaction */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Closing costs associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES properties ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_per_square" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "price_per_m2" REAL /* Price per square meter of the property */,
  "price_adjustments" TEXT /* Any price adjustments made during the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_per_square_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, management) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property unit */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES properties ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
